description: User hovers over the 'AI Interview' and 'Diary Study' filter tags at the top of the Explore page
frame_description: The cursor moves to the filter section where several active filters are displayed.

description: User clicks to remove the 'Diary Study' and 'AI Interview' filters
frame_description: The user interacts with the 'x' icons on the filter tags to clear them.

description: The list of opportunities updates, reducing from 8 to 4 visible items as filters are modified
frame_description: The screen content refreshes to show a new set of opportunity cards based on the updated filters.

description: User pauses to examine the updated list of opportunities, specifically a survey card
frame_description: The cursor rests over a blue 'Survey' card titled 'Review online grocery shopping experience'.
